verses.1: Deliver me from my enemies, my God.
verses.2: Deliver me from the workers of iniquity.
verses.3: For, behold, they lie in wait for my soul.
verses.4: I have done no wrong, yet they are ready to attack me.
verses.5: You, LORD God of Armies, the God of Israel,
verses.6: They return at evening, howling like dogs,
verses.7: Behold, they spew with their mouth.
verses.8: But you, LORD, laugh at them.
verses.9: Oh, my Strength, I watch for you,
verses.10: My God will go before me with his loving kindness.
verses.11: Don’t kill them, or my people may forget.
verses.12: For the sin of their mouth, and the words of their lips,
verses.15: They shall wander up and down for food,
verses.16: But I will sing of your strength.
verses.17: To you, my strength, I will sing praises.
